title: Brazilian-Style Rice Bake
description: A flavorful and simple rice dish with a twist of Brazilian spices. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a lunch meal.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, mix together rice, brazilian-style seasoning, and dried oregano (if using).
3. In a separate pan, sauté the onion, garlic, and sweet potato until tender.
4. Add the diced tomatoes to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
5. In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of rice mixture, followed by a layer of the vegetable mixture.
6. Repeat steps 5 for 2-3 layers, ending with a layer of rice on top.
7. If using cheese, sprinkle on top of the final layer of rice.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the top is lightly browned.
9. Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
